en: Why didn't you finish your homework?
ja: なんで宿題やらなかったの？
vi: Sao ban khong lam bai tap?

en: What can you say to this?
ko: 뭐라고 할 수 있을까? I don't know.

en: Well, you could say, I don't know, I don't know, or I don't know, I don't know, or I
ko: I don't know. 또는 I don't know. I don't know. 또는 I don't know.
ja: えっと、I don't know、I don't know、または I don't know、I don't know、または
zhTW: 你可以說 I don't know、I don't know，或 I don't know、I don't know，或
vi: Ban co the noi I don't know, I don't know, hoac I don't know, I don't know, hoac

en: don't know, I don't know, or uh-uh, uh-uh.
ko: I don't know. 또는 uh uh uh uh. 다 I
ja: I don't know、I don't know、または uh-uh, uh-uh。
zhTW: I don't know、I don't know，或 uh-uh, uh-uh。
vi: I don't know, I don't know, hoac uh-uh, uh-uh.

en: These all mean, I don't know.
ko: I don't know. 또는 I don't know. I don't know. 또는 I don't know.
ja: これらはすべて「わからない」という意味。
zhTW: 這些都是「我不知道」的意思。
vi: Tat ca deu co nghia la toi khong biet.

ko: don't know라는 뜻이야. 더 많은 영어 수업을 구독해
ja: もっと英語レッスンが見たい人はチャンネル登録してね。
zhTW: 訂閱以獲得更多英語課程。
vi: Dang ky de xem them bai hoc tieng Anh.
